title: Lucid (LCID) Cuts 2025 Production Guidance Amid Global Trade Tensions
text: Lucid cut its 2025 production guidance amid global trade tensions and supply chain challenges. The company reduced the high end of its annual production guidance to around 18,000 vehicles from a previous forecast of between 18,000 and 20,000 units. This marked the second consecutive quarter of guidance cuts, reflecting the challenging operating environment. Tariff pressures and logistics costs impacted the company's ability to maintain aggressive production targets. Management indicated that prudent production management aligned with actual sales demand was the priority over maximizing vehicle output. The guidance reduction triggered analyst downgrades and reinforced investor concerns about Lucid's ability to achieve profitability.
